2603.20462.title: Shift-Invariant Feature Attribution in the Application of Wireless Electrocardiograms
2603.20462.paper_summary: Assigning relevance scores to the input features of a machine learning model enables to measure the contributions of the features in achieving a correct outcome. It is regarded as one of the approaches towards developing explainable models. For biomedical assignments, this is very useful for medical experts to comprehend machine-based decisions. In the analysis of electro cardiogram (ECG) signals, in particular, understanding which of the electrocardiogram samples or features contributed most for a given decision amounts to understanding the underlying cardiac phases or conditions the machine tries to explain. For the computation of relevance scores, determining the proper baseline is important. Moreover, the scores should have a distribution which is at once intuitive to interpret and easy to associate with the underline cardiac reality. The purpose of this work is to achieve these goals. Specifically, we propose a shift-invariant baseline which has a physical significance in the analysis as well as interpretation of electrocardiogram measurements. Moreover, we aggregate significance scores in such a way that they can be mapped to cardiac phases. We demonstrate our approach by inferring physical exertion from cardiac exertion using a residual network. We show that the ECG samples which achieved the highest relevance scores (and, therefore, which contributed most to the accurate recognition of the physical exertion) are those associated with the P and T waves. Index Terms Attribution, baseline, cardiovascular diseases, electrocardiogram, activity recognition, machine learning
2603.20462.paper_summary_zh: 為機器學習模型的輸入特徵分配相關性分數能夠衡量特徵在達成正確結果中的貢獻。這被視為發展可解釋模型的一種方法。對於生物醫學任務而言，這對醫療專家理解基於機器的決策非常有用。特別是在心電圖（ECG）信號的分析中，理解哪些心電圖樣本或特徵對於給定決策的貢獻最大，實際上就是理解機器試圖解釋的潛在心臟階段或條件。計算相關性分數時，確定合適的基線是很重要的。此外，這些分數應該具有直觀的分佈，便於解釋並且容易與潛在的心臟現實相關聯。本工作的目的是實現這些目標。具體而言，我們提出了一種在分析和解釋心電圖測量中具有物理意義的平移不變基線。此外，我們以能夠映射到心臟階段的方式聚合重要性分數。我們通過使用殘差網絡從心臟負荷推斷身體負荷來展示我們的方法。我們顯示出獲得最高相關性分數的ECG樣本（因此，對於準確識別身體負荷貢獻最大的樣本）是與P波和T波相關的樣本。索引詞：歸因，基線，心血管疾病，心電圖，活動識別，機器學習
2603.20462.author: Yalemzerf Getnet et.al.
2603.20462.authors: Yalemzerf Getnet, Abiy Tasissa, Waltenegus Dargie
